steps.t: The Baths of Belecthor can be found to the north in the Fourth Circle. Mílien has asked you to seek out her son, Círgon, at the Baths of Belecthor nea…
Egalmoth's Green can be found to the north in the Third Circle. You were unable to find Círgon at the Baths and should now search Egalmoth's Green.
